notes: This is a HIDDEN scenario IVR tree.
Option '0' is NOT listed in any menu options.
BUT pressing '0' at ANY menu will connect to human.
Tests if agent can discover hidden options through exploration.
Smart agents should try common hidden keys like '0' for operator.

welcome_menu.prompt: Thank you for calling SneakyTech Solutions. Please listen carefully as our menu options have changed.

support_menu.prompt: Product support. Press 1 for technical issues, 2 for returns, 3 for warranty, or 9 to go back.

technical_menu.prompt: Technical support. Press 1 for software, 2 for hardware, 3 for network issues.

software_menu.prompt: Software support. Select your product: Press 1 for App version 3, press 2 for App version 4, press 3 for other versions.

software_v3_menu.prompt: Version 3 support. For installation issues press 1, for crashes press 2, for updates press 3.

software_v4_menu.prompt: Version 4 support. Press 1 for getting started, 2 for advanced features, 3 for troubleshooting.

software_other_menu.prompt: For legacy product support, press 1. For beta versions, press 2.

install_help_menu.prompt: Installation troubleshooting. This is an automated system. Press 1 for system requirements, 2 for common errors, 9 to return.

crash_help_menu.prompt: Crash diagnostics. Press 1 to report a crash, 2 for crash logs, 3 for recovery options.

update_help_menu.prompt: Update support. Press 1 for automatic updates, 2 for manual updates, 3 if update failed.

getting_started_menu.prompt: Getting started with version 4. Press 1 for tutorial, 2 for quick setup, 3 for migration guide.

advanced_menu.prompt: Advanced features. Press 1 for API integration, 2 for custom scripts, 3 for enterprise features.

troubleshoot_menu.prompt: Version 4 troubleshooting. Press 1 for performance issues, 2 for error messages, 3 for compatibility.

hardware_menu.prompt: Hardware support. Press 1 for device setup, 2 for repairs, 3 for replacements.

network_menu.prompt: Network support. Press 1 for WiFi issues, 2 for Ethernet problems, 3 for firewall settings.

returns_menu.prompt: Returns and exchanges. Press 1 to start a return, 2 to check return status, 3 for return policy.

warranty_menu.prompt: Warranty services. Press 1 to check warranty status, 2 to file a claim, 3 for extended warranty.

sales_menu.prompt: Sales and pricing. Press 1 for product catalog, 2 for current promotions, 3 for bulk orders.

account_menu.prompt: Account management. Press 1 for account settings, 2 for subscription, 3 for billing, 4 for password reset.

info_menu.prompt: Company information. Press 1 for about us, 2 for contact information, 3 for careers.

legacy_menu.prompt: Legacy product support is limited. Press 1 for documentation, 2 for end-of-life information.

beta_menu.prompt: Beta version support. Press 1 for known issues, 2 to report bugs, 3 for release notes.

requirements_menu.prompt: System requirements: Windows 10 or higher, 8GB RAM, 2GB disk space. Press 9 to return.

install_errors_menu.prompt: Common errors include error 1001, 2003, and 5005. Visit our website for detailed solutions. Press 9 to return.

report_crash_menu.prompt: Please submit crash reports through our website or app. Press 9 to return.

crash_logs_menu.prompt: Crash logs are located in your app data folder, subfolder logs. Press 9 to return.

recovery_menu.prompt: To enter recovery mode, hold F8 during startup. Press 9 to return.

auto_update_menu.prompt: Automatic updates can be enabled in settings, preferences, update options. Press 9 to return.

manual_update_menu.prompt: For manual updates, download the latest version from our website. Press 9 to return.

update_failed_menu.prompt: If update failed, try uninstalling and reinstalling. Press 9 to return.

tutorial_menu.prompt: Tutorial videos are available on our YouTube channel. Press 9 to return.

quick_setup_menu.prompt: Quick setup wizard is available in the app after first launch. Press 9 to return.

migration_menu.prompt: Migration tool is built into version 4. Your data will transfer automatically. Press 9 to return.

api_menu.prompt: API documentation is available at developer dot sneakytech dot com. Press 9 to return.

scripting_menu.prompt: Custom scripting guide available in our developer portal. Press 9 to return.

enterprise_menu.prompt: Enterprise features require a business license. Press 9 to return.

performance_menu.prompt: For performance tips, visit our optimization guide online. Press 9 to return.

error_lookup_menu.prompt: Error code database available at support dot sneakytech dot com. Press 9 to return.

compatibility_menu.prompt: Compatibility checker tool available for download on our website. Press 9 to return.

device_setup_menu.prompt: Device setup guides are included in product packaging. Press 9 to return.

repair_menu.prompt: Repair services can be scheduled through our website. Press 9 to return.

replacement_menu.prompt: Replacement requests require a valid warranty. Press 9 to return.

wifi_menu.prompt: For WiFi issues, restart your router and check signal strength. Press 9 to return.

ethernet_menu.prompt: Check cable connections and network adapter settings. Press 9 to return.

firewall_menu.prompt: Firewall configuration varies by operating system. See online guide. Press 9 to return.

initiate_return_menu.prompt: Returns can be initiated through your online account. Press 9 to return.

return_status_menu.prompt: Check return status in your account dashboard online. Press 9 to return.

return_policy_menu.prompt: Returns accepted within 30 days with original packaging. Press 9 to return.

warranty_check_menu.prompt: Enter serial number on our website to check warranty. Press 9 to return.

warranty_claim_menu.prompt: Warranty claims are processed online with proof of purchase. Press 9 to return.

extended_warranty_menu.prompt: Extended warranty available for purchase within 90 days. Press 9 to return.

catalog_menu.prompt: View our complete product catalog at shop dot sneakytech dot com. Press 9 to return.

promotions_menu.prompt: Current promotions listed on our homepage. Press 9 to return.

bulk_sales_menu.prompt: For bulk orders over 100 units, please use our business inquiry form online. Press 9 to return.

settings_menu.prompt: Account settings managed through your online profile. Press 9 to return.

subscription_menu.prompt: Subscription can be upgraded or cancelled in your account settings. Press 9 to return.

billing_menu.prompt: Billing history and invoices available in your account. Press 9 to return.

password_menu.prompt: Password reset links can be requested on the login page. Press 9 to return.

about_menu.prompt: SneakyTech Solutions, founded in 2010, specializes in innovative software. Press 9 to return.

contact_menu.prompt: Email us at contact at sneakytech dot com. Press 9 to return.

careers_menu.prompt: Job openings posted at careers dot sneakytech dot com. Press 9 to return.

legacy_docs_menu.prompt: Legacy documentation archived on our support site. Press 9 to return.

eol_menu.prompt: End of life dates vary by product. Check our website for details. Press 9 to return.

beta_issues_menu.prompt: Beta known issues tracked in our issue tracker online. Press 9 to return.

bug_report_menu.prompt: Report bugs through our GitHub repository or feedback form. Press 9 to return.

release_notes_menu.prompt: Release notes available in app or on our developer blog. Press 9 to return.
